name: Cottage Cheese-Herb Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth and creamy, scraping the sides of the jar as needed.
3. Transfer to serving bowl and serve with fresh vegetable sticks.
4. Makes 1-1/3 cups dip.
5. Calories per 1 tablespoon serving: About 20.
